name: Hotel Rose
description:
Composed of thoughtfully designed independent bungalows and guestrooms in the annex house of a 19th-century building, Hotel Rose offers comfortable accommodation and a peaceful atmosphere.

The residence is set in a verdant park full of trees and flowers. Some of the accommodation opens out onto the river that leads to the famous Mont Saint Michel and offer a tranquil, relaxing living space. All of the bungalows are independently ecological and can accommodate 4 people (or 5 on request).

Enjoy a tasty breakfast, a casual drink or a relaxing moment on the manor's veranda or under the shade of the trees.

Hotel Rose also features a shared living area with a piano, free Wi-Fi access, games and plenty of reading material. Nearby you can take quiet walks or bike rides and enjoy traditional and regional cuisine in one of the local restaurants.

A traditional breakfast including homemade cakes is offered every morning and jams. Guests can also request a packed lunch.

Notre Dame de Bayeux Cathedral is 500 metres away and the Bayeux Tapestry is a 8-minute walk from the guest house. Le Petit Matin is also an ideal base for visiting the WWII D-Day landing beaches which are 9 km away. Omaha Beach is 10 km from the guest house.

Breakfast is served in the living room which features preserved floorboards, woodwork, a fireplace and a period mirror. When the weather is fine enough, it can also be enjoyed in the hotel's lush garden.

Being mostly spared by the ravages of WWII, Bayeux has preserved its heritage and rich architecture. Guests can discover the famous Tapisserie of Queen Mathilde, Notre-Dame cathedral, Baron Gerard's museum, and the memorial of the Battle of Normandy.

Ideally located for visiting Mont-Saint-Michel, this hotel is on the main street which leads to the Mont-Saint-Michel abbey.

Two annexes of the hotel are located in the middle of the village and are accessible by numerous stairs.

The rooms at Auberge Saint Pierre and the annexes have a private bathroom with a bath or shower. Some rooms offer sea views.

The hotel serves a buffet breakfast daily. Traditional Norman cuisine and fish dishes are served in the authentic restaurant and you can choose to dine on site.

description:
Stay in a Historic Hotel at the Heart of Mont Saint-Michel.

Hôtel La Mère Poulard, located in the heart of Mont Saint-Michel, has preserved the authentic charm of traditional inns from the past. For over a century, this iconic establishment has welcomed pilgrims and travelers from around the world in a setting rich in history.

The hotel consists of three historic houses, each offering a unique atmosphere:

The Historic Inn, where the story of La Mère Poulard began.

La Maison Rouge, with its adjoining garden, providing a peaceful setting.

L’Ermitage, also known as Maison d’Annette, the final residence of the famous cook.

The rooms, with their classic style, offer breathtaking views of the bay, the Abbey, or the medieval town. They are equipped with a flat-screen TV, free Wi-Fi, and a private bathroom with a bathtub.

La Mère Poulard’s renowned restaurant invites you to savor its traditional recipes, including the famous omelet, prepared using Annette Poulard’s unique expertise since 1888.

Take advantage of your stay to explore Mont Saint-Michel and its picturesque streets, hike the surrounding trails, or discover the region by bike.

Avranches is a 23-minute drive away, and Saint-Malo is 45 minutes away.

The check-in is at the reception of Le Relais Saint Michel (last hotel before the bridge leading to the Mont Saint-Michel)
address: 3 Boulevard de l'avancée, 50170 Le Mont Saint Michel, France

name: Le Relais Du Roy
description:
Le Relais Du Roy is a 3-star hotel situated next to the River Couesnon, just 1.5 km from the Mont Saint-Michel and 50 metres from the free shuttle bus.

Featuring flat-screen TVs with satellite channels, a telephone and a welcome tray, each guest room at Le Relais Du Roy is decorated in a classic style. They also have a private bathroom with a bath or a shower, free toiletries and a hairdryer. Some of the rooms feature a balcony.

A buffet breakfast is served each morning at the hotel.

A grocery store can be found within a 3-minute walk from the hotel. The town of Pontorson is 7 km away. Private parking is available with an extra cost.
address: La Caserne, 50170 Le Mont Saint Michel, France

name: Le Saint Aubert
description:
Set amid lush greenery, just 2 km from the Mont Saint-Michel, the hotel welcomes you in a warm and friendly atmosphere.

Hôtel Saint-Aubert features comfortable and very quiet rooms, surrounded by gardens full of flowers.

After a day spent exploring the Mont Saint-Michel, enjoy a delicious regional cuisine in the picturesque setting of a former farmhouse.

The helpful staff will be happy to provide you with information about the visits and the many attractions in the surrounding area.

The check-in is at the reception of Le Relais Saint Michel (last hotel before the bridge leading to the Mont Saint-Michel)
address: La Caserne, 50170 Le Mont Saint Michel, France

name: Mercure Mont Saint Michel
description:
This Mercure is situated in parkland just 2 km from the abbey of Mont Saint Michel. It offers spacious en suite rooms, a restaurant and bar and plenty of free on-site parking.

The air-conditioned rooms at Mercure Mont Saint Michel are equipped with facilities for making hot drinks.  A flat-screen TV with satellite and cable channels is also provided.

The restaurant, Le Pré Salé, is famous in the area and serves delicious seafood and regional specialities. The bar, Le Normandy, offers a relaxed setting for a drink amongst friends.

Mercure Mont Saint Michel is 6.5 km from Pontorson and 52 km from Saint-Malo.
address: La Caserne, 50170 Le Mont Saint Michel, France

name: Le Relais Saint Michel
description:
Le Relais Saint Michel is an hotel facing the bay of Mont Saint-Michel. All guest rooms ( except Twin Room Saint-Michel with interior view) offer a private terrace and some have panoramic views of Mont Saint-Michel.

The soundproofed rooms are comfortable and spacious. They are fully equipped with modern comforts including a minibar and free Wi-Fi access. Each room has en suite facilities.

The hotel’s restaurant offers traditional cuisine. Guests can enjoy a drink or a meal on the terrace, which offers views of the Mont St Michel.

A free shuttle service that stops in front of the hotel will take you to the famous landmark Mont St Michel in just 10 minutes. Safety jackets are provided for guests wishing to take a walk at night. For guests arriving by car, secured parking is available with an extra cost.
address: La Caserne, 50170 Le Mont Saint Michel, France

name: La Confiance
description:
Composed of 2 different buildings, Les Terrasses Poulard is a historical property in the heart of Mont Saint-Michel and offers views of the bay, the village and the street.

Accessed by stairs, each room has a modern décor. Some rooms include large windows with bay views. They are equipped with TV and a private bathroom.

Breakfast is served at the restaurant Les Terrasses de la Baie. Once arrived at the restaurant, please go to the first floor.
Alternatively, guests can enjoy a meal at the onsite La Confiance restaurant and offers meals, drinks and snacks.

Guests can enjoy a drink in the Les Terrasses Poulard’s bar. It offers a 24-hour front desk service and guests can leave their luggage at the reception.

Activities in the area include cycling, fishing and hiking and explore the island.

The check-in is at the reception of Le Relais Saint Michel (last hotel before the bridge leading to the Mont Saint-Michel)

Guests can enjoy regional cuisine at the Vert’s restaurant, La salicorne. The hotel’s bar, L’Equinoxe, opens onto a private terrace.

The Vert Hotel provides a 24-hour reception and private parking. There is also an on site supermarket and souvenir shop.

name: ibis Paris Bastille Opera
description:
Located in the city centre, 550 metres from Place de la Bastille, ibis Paris Bastille Opera is a 24-hour reception hotel with a French restaurant, a bar and air-conditioned rooms with a flat-screen, satellite TV.

The heated rooms at ibis Paris Bastille Opera feature parquet flooring and a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hairdryer. Free Wi-Fi access is provided.

A buffet breakfast composed of sweet and savoury dishes such as eggs, fruit salad, yogurts and juices is served every day. Pastries baked on site and fresh French Madeleine cakes are also on offer, as well as a hot beverage and a piece of fruit to take away. Outside of regular breakfast hours guests can also enjoy a lighter option, available from 04:00. All types of restaurants and bars can be found within a walking distance.

The accommodation also provides luggage storage, newspapers and a safety deposit box is available at reception.  A private car park is available at a surcharge.

Place des Vosges is situated a 10-minute walk away. The hotel is located 500 metres from Bastille Metro Station which provides direct access to Palais Royal-Musée du Louvre and Champs-Elysées-Clemenceau.

A 10-minute walk from La Villette Convention Center and from the Cité des Sciences et de l’Industrie, Campanile Paris 19 - La Villette features a 24-hour reception. 6 km from Stade de France Stadium, guests will benefit from free WiFi throughout the property.

All rooms at Campanile Paris 19 - Villette are air-conditioned and soundproofed. They feature a private bathroom, satellite TV and a welcome tray.

A buffet breakfast including fresh fruits and pastries but also scrambled eggs and sausages is served each morning while the restaurant proposes regional cuisine with buffet-style starters and desserts. Guests can also enjoy cocktails at the lounge bar while watching sport events on the big screen.

Campanile Paris 19 - La Villette offers secure private parking on site at an additional cost. It is located a 5-minute walk from the Ourcq Canal and 450 metres from Crimée Metro Station, which leads directly to the Louvre Museum. Decorated in soft pastel colours, the rooms at ibis Budget Paris Porte De Montmartre are contemporary in style and offer an LCD TV. Each also has a private bathroom with a shower and a separate toilet.

A breakfast is served everyday in the modern breakfast room. Additional facilities include vending machines in the 24-hour reception, luggage storage and Wi-Fi in public areas.

Local transport links lead directly to Paris’ city centre including sights such as Avenue Champs Elysées and Hôtel des Invalides. Public parking is available on site at an additional cost.

description:

Each guest room at the Mercure Paris La Sorbonne is equipped with en suite facilities and satellite TV.

A breakfast buffet is served daily and the Mercure La Sorbonne provides a laundry and dry cleaning service. There is also a 24-hour reception.

The hotel is a 5-minute walk from Luxembourg RER station, which provides direct access to Gare du Nord and Charles de Gaulle Airport. The Cluny-La Sorbonne Metro Station is 300 metres away.

name: Mercure Paris Montparnasse Raspail
description:

This lovely quarter is known for its famous bistros, cafés and clubs frequented and made famous by such people as Picasso, Josephine Baker and Jean-Paul Sartre.

Guestrooms are stylish and comfortable and equipped with modern en suite facilities. All rooms offer satellite TV and Wi-Fi internet access.

Mercure Raspail offers ideal accommodation and services for business stays. There is a buffet breakfast and room service for lunch and dinner available on site. The hotel also features 2 rooms with easy access for the disabled.

This superb location puts guests just a stone’s throw away from the Montparnasse train station, the district of Saint-Germain-des-Prés and just a short Metro ride to Place Saint-Michel and the River Seine.

The metro station Maubert Mutualite is 200 metres from the hotel providing good access to the city’s top tourist attractions.

The air-conditioned guest rooms at the Mercure Tour Eiffel Grenelle have a flat-screen TV and a safety deposit box. Each room has a private bathroom with bathtub and hairdryer. Free WiFi access is provided.

The hotel offers a buffet breakfast every morning and room service.

The guest rooms each include a desk, cable TV, air conditioning and a safe. All rooms at the Hyatt Regency Paris Etoile offers views over Paris. Deluxe bath products are provided in the private bathrooms.

MAYO restaurant in the lobby of the hotel offers guests a seasonal cuisine and local products.

This hotel is connected to the Palais des Congrès and La Defense business district is only 5 minutes away by Metro. A concierge and a business centre are among the additional services. Porte Maillot Metro Station is an 8-minute walk away.

name: Hilton Paris Opera
description:
Hilton Paris Opera is a luxurious hotel situated in the heart of Paris, just 800 metres from the Opéra Garnier. You you can enjoy cocktails in Le Grand Salon bar or the lip-smacking “street food” style cuisine, by Chef Mathieu Afonso at the Quai 108 restaurant.

Designed in a classic Parisian style, the air-conditioned rooms have a minibar, USB port and a flat-screen TV. Free WiFi is provided in all rooms, and some rooms also include bathrobes and slippers. The private bathroom has heated flooring.

Breakfast is served daily at the property. Guests can also access the Executive Lounge, which offers complimentary refreshments, newspapers and WiFi for an additional cost.

Hilton Paris Opera features a fitness centre, a 24-hour front desk and meeting rooms.

Saint Lazare Train and Metro Station is only 80 metres from this hotel, while the famous department stores Printemps and Galeries Lafayette are a 5-minute walk away.

name: Hôtel Botaniste
description: Hôtel Botaniste in Paris offers a 4-star experience with a sun terrace, garden, bar, and free WiFi. Guests enjoy air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and garden views.

name: Hôtel Clairefontaine
description:
Hôtel Clairefontaine is located just a 5-minute walk from Montparnasse and Denfert-Rochereau Metro Stations, which give direct access to the Champs Elysées, Montmarte, Notre Dame and Eiffel Tower. The hotel offers a 24-hour reception, luggage storage and laundry services.

All the contemporary rooms features a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a desk, safety deposit box,  air conditioning, wardrobe and a private bathroom with a shower.

The hotel offers both a buffet breakfast, which can be served to guest rooms. You can also dine on the terrace in the garden while browsing the free Wi-Fi and daily newspapers. A large range of bars and restaurants can be found in the area.

The property is also ideally located a 5-minute walk from Montparnasse-Bienvenüe Train Station. Guests have a choice of 2 paid parking areas at Vinci Montparnasse and Vinci Gaîté. Porte de Versailles Exhibition Centre is 5 km away.

A public shuttle service is available for guests using Orly Airport. It leaves from Denfert Rochereau Square, which is a 5-minute walk away. Denfert Rochereau Metro Station also offers direct access to Charles de Gaulle Airport and the Latin Quarter.

A public shuttle service is available with extra charges

Each air-conditioned room features free WiFi access, a desk and a 42-inch LED TV with 42 satellite channels and free video on demand. The private bathrooms have a bathtub or a walk-in shower with a rain shower-head, free luxury toiletries, bathrobe and slippers.

Breakfast is served each morning in the communal lounge with an additional cost. A minibar, Nespresso© coffee machine and electric kettle are also available in each room. Several shops, restaurants and luxury boutiques can be found within walking distance from the hotel.

Hotel de Sèze is 300 metres from the Opéra Garnier, 700 metres from the Place de la Concorde and 700 metres from Saint-Lazare Train Station. Paris - Charles de Gaulle Airport is 22 km away.

Guests will find grab and go on site.

Each of the spacious guest rooms at Bradford Elysées has a classically elegant décor, and is equipped with cable TV. Some rooms feature a balcony and each room includes complimentary non-alcoholic beverages in the minibar. The tiled private bathrooms include a marble sink.

A buffet breakfast is served every morning in the hotel’s luminous dining room. Guests can also choose to have breakfast served in the guest room. Starting in the afternoon until late in the evening, guests can also enjoy free non-alcoholic beverages and snacks in the hotel lobby. Guests can stop by any of Astotel's hotels in Paris to enjoy this service and have a drink or snack, free of charge.

The Bradford Elysées hotel is a 5-minute walk from Franklin D. Roosevelt Metro Station providing direct access to the Tuileries Gardens, the Louvre Museum and Place de la Bastille. Free Wi-Fi access is available throughout the hotel, and all rooms are serviced by a lift. After a day of sightseeing, guests can relax in the hotel lounge.

name: B&B HOTEL Rouen Centre
description:
Ideally located for exploring Rouen, a city of art, history, and culture. Whether you're traveling for business, visiting family, or on a weekend getaway, our hotel offers all the amenities you need for a successful stay.

Our rooms are designed to guarantee maximum comfort:
- Quality bedding
- Private bathroom with shower
- Free high-speed Wi-Fi
- Flat-screen TV with TNT channels
- Rooms accessible to people with reduced mobility (PMR).
We offer several configurations: double and twin rooms.

Full and delicious buffet breakfast
Every morning between 6:00 a.m. and 10:00 a.m., enjoy our all-you-can-eat buffet breakfast, served in a welcoming dining room.
On the menu: pastries, breads, brioche, jams, yogurts, cereals, eggs, ham, bacon, cheeses, hot drinks, and fruit juices.
An ideal way to start your day of work or discovery. 

Arrival and Departure Times
Check-in from 2:00 PM
Check-out until 12:00 PM
For late arrivals, please notify reception.

Secure Private Parking
We provide secure private parking (additional charge).
The rate is €6 per day. To access the parking lot, please go to "Avenue de Bretagne," follow the signs for night access, and park at the letter K.
Public parking is also available nearby.

A Strategic Location in the Heart of Rouen
Located on the banks of the Seine, a few minutes' walk from the historic center of Rouen, our hotel enjoys an ideal central location for discovering the city's cultural and architectural riches.

Close to Museums and Cultural Sites
Rouen is a city with an exceptional heritage. From the hotel, you can easily access the main museums and monuments on foot or by public transport:

Museum of Fine Arts (15-minute walk): one of the richest collections in France, with works by Monet, Delacroix, Modigliani, and Gérard David.

Historial Joan of Arc: a multimedia immersion into the story of the Maid of Orléans, a must-see for history buffs.

Museum of Natural History: ideal for families, one of the oldest museums in France.

Rouen Cathedral (12-minute walk): a masterpiece of Gothic architecture, immortalized by Monet.

Gros-Horloge, Saint-Maclou Church, and Aître Saint-Maclou are all within walking distance.

Close to universities and training centers
The B&B Hôtel Rouen Centre is also an excellent choice for students, teachers, researchers, or visiting parents:

University of Rouen Normandy – Pasteur Campus: less than 10 minutes on foot

Faculty of Law, Literature, and Humanities: accessible by bus or on foot

INSA Rouen, NEOMA Business School, CESI, ESIGELEC: easily accessible by public transport or car

CHU Charles Nicolle & University Hospital: less than 15 minutes by public transport

Practical on-site services

Lougne bar available from October 20th
Free high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the hotel

Vending machines with snacks and drinks

Pets welcome (surcharge)

Elevator

100% non-smoking hotel

24-hour reception

Good value for money in the heart of the city

The B&B Hôtel Rouen Centre offers you a An excellent compromise between comfort, location, and price. Whether you're on a short or extended stay, you'll appreciate our simple and efficient service, in a warm atmosphere.

A buffet breakfast composed of sweet and savoury dishes such as eggs, fruit salad, yogurts and juices is served every day. Pastries baked on site and fresh French Madeleine cakes are also on offer, as well as a hot beverage and a piece of fruit to take away. Outside of regular breakfast hours guests can also enjoy a lighter option, available from 04:00. An on-site restaurant is also available.

This property is 500 metres from Saint-Martin Collegiate Church and 600 metres from House of the Heads. The reception is open 24 hours a day. Colmar Christmas Market is 350 meters away.

name: L'Ours de Colmar - Appartements en centre ville

L'Ours de Colmar is set in Colmar, 300 metres from Saint-Martin Collegiate Church. House of the Heads is 500 metres away. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.

All units have a cable flat-screen TV. There is a seating and/or dining area in some units. There is also a kitchen, fitted with a dishwasher, oven and microwave. A toaster and coffee machine are also offered. Every unit comes with a private bathroom with a hairdryer. Towels are provided. A free laundry service can be requested for any stay of at least 4 days.

Colmar Expo is 2.6 km from l'Ours de Colmar. Basel Airport is 55 km from the property. Subject to availability, private parking is possible for an extra charge.

The contemporary rooms feature a private bathroom and a TV.

A breakfast buffet is served daily at the Cit'Hotel Primo Colmar Centre. The hotel also provides a 24-hour reception.

Public parking is available in front of the Cit'Hotel Primo Colmar Centre at an extra cost. It is just 1.7 km from Colmar Train Station. You can also travel the 15-minute drive to the famous vineyards on the Alsace Wine Route.

name: Hôtel Maison Turenne
description:
Hotel Turenne is located at the entrance to Colmar’s old quarter, 750 metres from the Saint Martin Church. It offers air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi access.

Each room is equipped with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a private bathroom. All rooms are accessible by a lift.

The hotel serves a buffet breakfast every morning, and there are many typical Alsatian restaurants in the surrounding area. Guests can also enjoy a drink in the hotel bar.

The Hotel Turenne’s reception is open 24 hours a day. Private parking for cars, bicycles and motorbikes is also available at an extra cost and is subject to availability (reservation is needed),the garage is available from noon until noon on the day of departure.

The hotel is close to the famous Unterlinden and Bartholdi museums and the town’s pedestrian and commercial districts. Gare de Colmar Train station is 1.3 km away, the German border is 20 km from the Hotel Turenne.

Located in the heart of Colmar, ideally situated between Colmar Cathedral and the main streets, COLMARAPPART Grand'Rue offers self-catering apartments and suites.

All apartments and suites are accessed by a lift and include a TV, WiFi access and a private bathroom with a hairdryer and a bath or shower.

Guests are able to prepare their own meals at COLMARAPPART Grand'Rue. Each accommodation type has a kitchen with kitchenware, a microwave and a fridge. A dishwasher is also provided.

The accommodation is located in a pedestrian street within easy reach of restaurants, bars and grocery stores. Limited parking places are available at an extra charge and upon prior request. The parking is also subject to availability.

Each accommodation is decorated in a contemporary style and features a seating area and TV. Some apartments offer a balcony or terrace, upon availability. The kitchen is equipped with an oven or microwave, dishwasher and refrigerator.

A breakfast can be enjoyed each morning at an extra cost in the property's breakfast room, which also features a terrace. Baked goods can be delivered to your room and must be ordered the evening before at reception.

Eguisheim is 10 km away and Bâle-Mulhouse-Fribourg Airport is 56 km from the accommodation

Colmar Hotel is located in Colmar, 1 km from House of the Heads. Colmar Christmas Market - Place des Dominicains is 1.2 km away. It features free WiFi, a 24-hour reception, a bar and a free private parking in front of the hotel.

Every room is equipped with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a kettle and a private bathroom. Free toiletries and a hair dryer are available in all of the rooms.

Free parking and paid secured parking are available on site. Saint-Martin Collegiate Church is 1.1 km from Colmar Hotel, while Colmar Expo is 3.5 km away. The nearest airport is Euro Basel-Mulhouse-Freiburg Airport, 54 km from the property.

description:
The Domaine de Basil is a former sheep barn located 10 km from the Lac Blanc ski resort. It offers rooms with a living area and a private bathroom. Some also have a private terrace.

A continental breakfast is served daily in the Basil Domaine's dining room. There is also a lounge area with a fire place.

Free internet access is available at the Basil's reception. The residence also provides free private parking. Local leisure activities include hiking at the Vosgien Trekking Club.

name: Résidence Pierre & Vacances Le Clos d'Eguisheim
description:
Reception opening hours are Monday to Thursday from 08:30 to 12:00 and from 16:00 to 19:00, Friday from 08:30 to 12:00 and from 16:00 to 20:00, Saturday from 08:00 to 12:00 and from 14:00 to 20:00, and Sunday from 08:45 to 12:00 and from 16:00 to 19:00.

If the total amount of the reservation is not paid within the timeframe stated in the booking conditions, the property reserves the right to cancel the reservation and apply cancellation fees.

The price includes accommodation, all taxes and charges (excluding city tax and application fees), bed linen, towels (one bath towel and one hand towel), one dish towel, one bath mat, a cleaning kit, and end-of-stay cleaning (excluding the kitchen area and dishes).

Please note that beds are not made upon arrival; this service is available at an additional cost. For more information or to request this service, guests are invited to contact the reception directly at +33 (0)3 89 30 41 20 or [reception.eguisheim@groupepvcp.com](mailto:reception.eguisheim@groupepvcp.com).

Pets are allowed at an additional cost of €75 per week.

Guests may request a specific accommodation location within the residence for an extra fee by contacting the property directly using the contact details provided in the booking confirmation.

For invoice requests, the invoice will be issued under the name stated on the reservation, and any modification may incur additional fees.

Credit card is the only accepted method of payment.
A credit card pre-authorization (VISA or MASTERCARD) will be requested upon arrival. To save time during check-in, we recommend completing your registration via your Pierre & Vacances customer account in advance.

The baby kit costs €45 per week or €33 per short stay, or €12 per item when rented individually.

name: Hotel SPA Husseren Collections - Proche Colmar - Eguisheim

The establishment boasts a bistronomic restaurant, "Bain de Forêt", with a terrace featuring forest views. Guests can also enjoy an indoor swimming pool, a sauna, and bright seminar rooms with professional material and Wi-Fi access.

Staff at the Hotel Restaurant & Spa Husseren Collections speak English, German, and Italian. Nine charging stations (including 3 tesla) for electric cars are available at this property.

Each room is equipped with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and an en suite bathroom. Rooms are simple in style and some have a balcony and garden view.

A buffet breakfast is available every morning at Relais du Klevener. For other meals the restaurant on site proposes traditional French cuisine.

The Relais du Klevener is on the Wine Route, 28 minutes by car from Strasbourg and its train station and airport. Free private parking is available.

Located in Husseren-les-Châteaux, Chambres d’hôtes Schneider is set in an Alsatian vineyard and offers a garden and terrace. The Wahlenbourg, Weckmund and Hohlandsbourg Castles are just 3 km away.

All rooms feature a view of the vineyard and a wardrobe while one has a kitchenette. The en suite bathroom includes a shower.

A continental breakfast serving fresh bread and homemade jams is provided each morning. Restaurants can be found 2 km away in Eguisheim and guests have access to the communal kitchenette.

Wine tasting is possible in the town as well as hiking activities and Colmar is 10 km away. Additional features include free Wi-Fi access and free private parking on site.

description:
This hotel de charme offers en suite accommodation within the Ballons des Vosges Regional Park. It is situated in the scenic village of Thannenkirch, in the Alsace region.

Garden views are available from the bright guest rooms, which have queen-size beds. A flat-screen TV with satellite channels is provided in all rooms. Private bathrooms are equipped with amenities and a hairdryer.

A buffet breakfast is served daily and can be taken on the terrace in warmer weather.

Guests at Haut Koenigsbourg have access to a lounge with a TV, video games and a range of books. Free Wi-Fi is accessible from this lounge.

Haut Koenigsbourg Chateau is 7.1 km from the hotel. Ribeauvillé Train Station is 10 km away. Free private parking is possible on site.

name: The Babel Community Hôtel - Grenoble Bastille
description: The Babel Community Hôtel - Grenoble Bastille is situated in Grenoble city centre, offering stunning views of the mountains and surrounding area. Guests enjoy easy access to local attractions such as Grenoble Train Station (1.9 km) and The Bastille Grenoble (16-minute walk).

name: Novotel Grenoble Centre
description:
The Novotel is set at the heart of Grenoble's business district, only a few steps from the TGV train station. A tram stop is conveniently situated just outside the hotel. Many large companies are located close to the Novotel Grenoble Centre, and the historical centre is only a 10-minute drive away.

The air-conditioned rooms are equipped with a desk, a safety deposit box and a minibar. Some rooms feature a Nespresso coffee machine. Each room has a private bathroom with a shower and a hairdryer.

Guests at the Novotel benefit from access to the hotel fitness centre. The hotel also features a restaurant, a bar, conference rooms, facilities for the disabled, and private parking at an additional cost. Up to 2 children (16 years and under) stay free when sharing with parents.

This hotel is also just a few kilometres from the Belledonne Massif and the Vercors Mountains.

name: Campanile Grenoble Centre Gare
description:
Campanile Grenoble Centre Gare is located near a pedestrian and commercial street in Grenoble city centre. It features en suite rooms with free WiFi. The Train Station is 250 metres away.

Proximity to the bus station and its frequent shuttle bus departures to the ski resorts (300 m). Direct tram to Alpexpo (Grenoble event park).

With double glazing, each room at Campanile Grenoble Centre Gare includes an LCD TV with SMART TV and international channels and a private bathroom. A hairdryer is available at the reception, which is open 24 hours per day.

A buffet breakfast is served every morning in the air-conditioned breakfast room. Guests are invited to visit the Musée de Grenoble, which is 1.6 km away, and the Cathedral, which is a 20-minute walk from the hotel.

The Grenoble-Bastille cable car is 1 km away and the Palais des Sports is 2.5 km away. The Tramway stop is 40 metres away and Grenoble Airport is a 35-minute away. There is an available public parking area that is paid about 200 meters away from the hotel.
address: 6 Place De La Gare, 38000 Grenoble, France

name: Kyriad Grenoble Centre
description:
Located 200 metres from Stade Lesdiguières, Kyriad Grenoble Centre offers 3-star accommodation with 24-hour front desk and free WiFi. Alpexpo convention centre is 3 km away from the property. A private car park under video surveillance is available for guests and is free of charge.

All rooms are air-conditioned and equipped with a flat-screen satellite TV, including Canal+. The private bathrooms come with a bath and free toiletries. Tea and coffee making facilities are provided.

Room service and bar access are available 24/7 and the hotel serves a buffet breakfast every day.

La Bastille Grenoble cable-car is 4 km from the accommodation, while  Grenoble train station is 3 km away and accessible in 10 minutes with the tramway. Grenoble - Isère Airport is 46 km away.
address: 116 Cours de la Libération, 38100 Grenoble, France

name: B&B HOTEL Grenoble Centre Alpexpo
description:
This B&B hotel is located in Grenoble, just 800 metres from Alpexpo. With a 24-hour reception, it offers a free Wi-Fi connection and soundproofed accommodation. It is 200 metres from Grand Place Tram Station.

All of the rooms at B&B Grenoble Centre Alpexpo are serviced by a lift and are decorated in a contemporary style. Each room features a desk, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower.

A continental breakfast is served every morning in the communal lounge.

Luggage storage is provided at B&B Grenoble Centre Alpexpo. There are limited parking places available free of charge, and the Bastille is 7 km away. There is access to A480 motorway, 5 km away.

name: 1924 Hôtel
description:
Located in the heart of Grenoble on a quiet street, only 450 metres from the SNCF train station and offers free WiFi, service clean, comfortable rooms with modern facilities and a friendly, relaxed atmosphere.

All the cosy guest rooms are equipped with all modern amneties, en suite facilities, soundproofing and satellite TV. All rooms are served by a small lift. Some allow you to see the mountain Vercors.

 The helpful staff at this delightful hotel will help you to make the most of your visit. Local and Bio breakfast is served every morning. Guests can find restaurants nearby.

Explore Grenoble on foot, with our bikes available, or using the excellent public transport links. Guests will appreciate the tramwa stop just a stone's throw from the hotel, providing easy access to the city's business districts and famous sites

name: B&B HOTEL Grenoble Centre Verlaine
description:
B&B Grenoble Centre Verlaine is just 3 km from the centre of Grenoble and the SAEM Alpexpo Events Centre. A buffet breakfast is prepared daily and free WiFi is provided in the air-conditioned rooms.

A flat-screen TV is provided in the soundproofed guest rooms, which have a modern décor. The suite also offers a terrace, a DVD player and a bath.

Meal trays can be served for dinner, from 18:00 to 20:30.

This hotel also has luggage storage and private parking on site. The Modern Art Gallery is just 3 km away and the hotel is accessible via the A480 motorway, 1.3 km away. Free public parking is available nearby and paid secured parking is available at the hotel.

name: Hôtel Terminus
description:
Located in Grenoble, the Hôtel Terminus is opposite the bus and SNCF train stations. It offers air-conditioned and soundproofed rooms with satellite TV and free Wi-Fi access.

The Hôtel Terminus Hotel provides a 24-hour reception and a currency exchange service.

The Terminus is 5 minutes from the World Trade Centre and 1 kilometre from the A48 motorway, which provides easy access to Lyon and Geneva.

Guests can use the hotel’s bicycle and car rental services to explore Grenoble and the Rhone-Alpes region.

This hotel is located in the heart of Annency, a few steps from the castle. It offers individually-decorated rooms with views of the canals, the medieval castle or the town.

Each air-conditioned guest-room in the 18th-century building has satellite TV, WiFi internet access and a private bathroom.

The Palais de l’Isle serves a daily buffet breakfast and guests are invited to relax with a drink in the bar. Guests are also able to purchase snack jars.

The Hôtel du Palais de l'Isle is just a few minutes’ walk from Lake Annecy and the cathedral. The property offers discount in the 3 nearby public car parks.

description:
Offering a 24-hour front desk, Ace Hotel Annecy is located in Seynod. Free WiFi access is available in public areas and the rooms. The property is within 5 km from Lake Annecy and Annecy’s city centre.

Each room here will provide you with a TV, air conditioning and satellite channels. Featuring a shower, the private bathroom also comes with a hairdryer and free toiletries. Extras include a desk and a wardrobe.

At Ace Hotel Annecy you will find vending machines and a dining room where a breakfast is served each morning. The hotel is in a shopping area and a variety of restaurants can be found within 300 metres.

Facilities offered at the property include a shared lounge. An array of activities can be enjoyed on site or in the surroundings, including skiing, golfing and cycling. Lac d’Annecy Golf Course is a 25-minute drive from the hotel.

Free parking is available on site. Annecy Train Station is 3.4 km away. Public transit to the city centre of Annecy is just 100 metres away, and operates Mon-Sat.

At the hotel, all rooms are individually decorated, the rooms are fitted with a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hairdryer.

name: Les Loges Annecy Vieille Ville
description:
Les Loges Annecy Vieille Ville offers 5-star, self-catering apartments set in the heart of Annecy’s historical district just 200 metres from Annecy lake, near shops, restaurants and bars. It has free Wi-Fi.

Each apartment features a Turkish bath, a wine cabinet, a fireplace, a Nespresso coffee machine and a welcome platter with local produce. You can relax in the André Renault electric bed with the tablet computer, which can be connected to the Bose hi-fi sytem. The private bathroom comes with a bathrobe and slippers.

The property offers a wide range of services including a ticket service, a tour desk, packed lunches and a concierge. It is non-smoking throughout and has facilities for disabled guests as well as a lift. A continental breakfast is provided.

Les Loges is 200 m from Annecy Castle and 100 m from the Annecy Castle Museum. The Palais de l'Ile, Saint Francis Church and Annecy Train Station are all 300 m away. The nearest airport is at Geneva, 49 km away.
